meta.source: SBAllen GameFAQs 3DS — vérifié en jeu DE (Antoine)

mechanics.summary: Certains niveaux imposent un malus (Great Sea Rule), annulable en utilisant la bonne Item Card pendant le niveau (souvent un boomerang sur le Big Octo). Murs de vent : barriere de la carte explorable supprimee en utilisant le bon objet puis en terminant le niveau, ce qui debloque la case adjacente.

A-3.mission_en: Strengthen your army and defeat the enemy! Lv.3
skulltula_cond: KO 1000 enemies. Located in the dead end found along the path northwest from the Allied Base. Use the hookshot to reach it.
Complete the first mission and capture five or more enemy Keeps without losing (                 4+ hearts |         40%
